𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘-𝗛𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗦 | To provide developers with an enhanced, more intuitive, and interactive coding experience with Claude Code by adding audible feedback for key events.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide developers with an enhanced, more intuitive, and interactive coding experience with Claude Code by adding audible feedback for key events.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Adds auditory feedback to Claude Code sessions.
✅ Supports 27 different hook events.
✅ Provides sound cues for session start, tool use, agent response, and more.
✅ Includes installation guides for Mac, Linux, and Windows.
✅ Changelog for hook additions and Claude Code version updates.


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 384 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 33 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository enhances the Claude Code AI by adding auditory feedback for various events within the coding workflow. It integrates "hooks" that trigger sounds, providing real-time vocal cues for actions like session start, tool usage, agent responses, and task completion.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-hooks

✅ Real-time video-driven motion capture
✅ 3D virtual character rendering
✅ Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux)
✅ GUI with Material Design 3 and Dark Mode
✅ WebXR API support for Mocap Forwarding
✅ Model viewer with bones & dressing controller
✅ OBS live-streaming support
✅ Full-body motion capture
✅ Auto Skeleton Detection for VRM and Mixamo FBX
✅ Manual mapping for any skeleton structure

SysMocap is a cross-platform real-time motion capture system designed for animating 3D virtual characters. It supports various input formats and offers features like full-body tracking, facial expression capture, and integration with live-streaming software.

✅ CVPR 2023 paper

✅ Full image mode

SadTalker is a Python-based project that animates a single portrait image to create a talking head video, driven by an audio input. It learns realistic 3D motion coefficients for stylized, audio-driven facial animation, enabling users to generate talking head videos from static images and speech.

The AI Scientist-v2 is an advanced agentic system designed for fully autonomous scientific discovery. It can independently generate hypotheses, conduct experiments, analyze data, and author scientific manuscripts, generalizing across ML domains without human-authored templates. This version utilizes a progressive agentic tree search managed by an experiment manager agent.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗔 | Extracting structured data and layout information from complex documents, including images and PDFs, using advanced OCR capabilities.  🌟 Rising Fast!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Extracting structured data and layout information from complex documents, including images and PDFs, using advanced OCR capabilities.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Converts documents to markdown, html, or json with detailed layout information
✅ Support for 90+ languages
✅ Excellent handwriting support
✅ Reconstructs forms accurately, including checkboxes
✅ Strong performance with tables, math, and complex layouts
✅ Extracts images and diagrams, and adds captions and structured data
✅ Two inference modes: local (HuggingFace) and remote (vLLM server)


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 40 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Chandra OCR 2 is a state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR) model designed to convert images and PDFs into structured formats like HTML, Markdown, and JSON. It excels at preserving layout information and handles complex documents including tables, forms, handwriting, and mathematical content across over 90 languages.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗟𝗬-𝗙𝗔𝗦𝗧-𝗪𝗛𝗜𝗦𝗣𝗘𝗥 | To provide extremely fast, on-device audio transcription via a command-line interface, significantly reducing the time required to process audio files.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Jupyter Notebook 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide extremely fast, on-device audio transcription via a command-line interface, significantly reducing the time required to process audio files.
📅 Created: Oct 2023 • Updated: May 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ On-device audio transcription with OpenAI's Whisper
✅ Optimized for speed using Transformers, Optimum, and flash-attn
✅ Supports Whisper Large v3 and distil-whisper models
✅ Achieves significantly faster transcription times compared to standard implementations
✅ Provides a user-friendly CLI for easy inference
✅ Benchmarks available for various optimization techniques and hardware


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 12.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 955 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 100 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Insanely Fast Whisper is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that leverages advanced optimizations like Flash Attention 2 and fp16 precision to achieve extremely rapid audio transcription using OpenAI's Whisper models on-device. It is designed for users who need to transcribe large amounts of audio quickly, particularly on NVIDIA GPUs and Macs.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫
